name: TeachMe.To Golf Lessons - San Bruno Golf Center
address: 2101 Sneath Ln STE 1, San Bruno, CA 94066
about: TeachMe.To Golf Lessons at San Bruno Golf Center is a premier outdoor practice facility offering professional instruction for all skill levels. The venue features a 1,400 sq ft short game area and a driving range, providing a comprehensive environment for golfers to develop their game. Partnered with TeachMe.To, it operates as a vetted venue with no extra fees and is known for its high volume of lessons and popular status among golfers seeking to improve their technique and consistency through personalized coaching.
why_golfers_like_it: Premier golf practice facility with 1,400 sq ft short game area and driving range
Professional instruction tailored to individual player's unique needs and goals
Flexible cancellation policy with free cancellation up to 24 hours before and reschedule options
Vetted partner facility with no extra fees

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food services available on-site
No mention of alcohol services available on-site

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether clubs are provided or if you need to bring your own. It's recommended to contact the venue directly for details on equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The website does not mention any food or drink services, so bringing your own may be allowed, but it's best to confirm directly with the venue.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: This venue is an outdoor practice facility with a driving range and short game area, not a simulator course where 18 holes would be played.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers coaching for all skill levels and mentions working with teenagers, making it suitable for junior golfers and youth players.
